decisions.rationale: Decompose AC-1 explicitly names ai_RNbBHXeq–ev; implementation matches those ids with correct copy and hierarchy (criteria_audit AC-1 pass, ui_evidence pass). IR slice bTHDZ____root.json uses ai_RNbBHXcz and ai_RNbBHXdA–E for the same nodes — an automated selector alias gap, not a missing named ui_ref. Medium priority; CHAT-05 depends on delete workflow behavior, not slice-id remapping. Defer id harmonization to a later parity/tooling pass.

Group_overlay_ is listed in ui_refs but Popup_dialog_ on the dialog root plus shadcn overlay delivers acceptable visual parity; ui_evidence is partial only for the unused inner wrapper style. Low-priority polish with no AC violation and no downstream item blocked — consistent with AuthDialog pattern variance noted in review.

Onboarding-data fallback when chatmessage table is absent cannot purge message rows server-side, but Chat.tsx clears local thread cache so UX stays consistent. Production Supabase path satisfies AC-2 message purge; this is a prototype-schema edge case outside current scope with no functional_ok or blocker impact.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 0 accept. Review gate passed (ok:true, coverage 100%, functional_ok:true, no blockers). All critiques are polish/backlog: C-1 slice-vs-decompose bubble id alias, C-2 Group_overlay_ inner wrapper, C-3 onboarding fallback message-purge documentation — none block CHAT-05 or other downstream items.
